title: Product Manager, Court Transformation
summary: Carry the ON Courts model into new states: work with High Courts, judges and registries in Punjab, Haryana and Gujarat to take DRISTI from one court to many.
body:
## The role

One court is live. The next three states are on the map. Between a working platform and a running court sits everything you will own: process, policy, training, trust.

[draft description, refine before publishing]

## What you'll do

- Be the bridge between judges, registry staff and the engineering team
- Translate each court's rules and realities into product requirements
- Run pilots, measure litigant outcomes, and iterate in public

## Who this suits

- 4+ years in product roles, ideally with government or public-interest technology
- Patience for institutions and urgency for the people inside them
- Willing to travel regularly to partner courts

## How it works

Full-time role with a PUCAR collective member organisation, based flexibly with regular travel to partner states.
